name: Cockroachdb Cloud
description: Connect Cline to Cockroachdb Cloud through this MCP server configuration from the imported plugin marketplace bundle.

env.name: COCKROACHDB_CLUSTER_ID
env.description: Cockroachdb Cloud value for cockroachdb cluster id.

install.notes: Imported from plugin bundle config `cockroachdb/.mcp.json`. The remote server requires the configured HTTP header values at runtime.
